creator: bsdx@looksharp.net
text:
Pharos@EFnet of bnc fame wrote a screensaver and asked me to submit it

It puts a nifty wormhole design on the screen when activated

Fix: 

Grab http://www.looksharp.net/~user1/worm_saver/worm.tar.gz
or the individual uncompressed files from http://www.looksharp.net/~user1/worm_saver/worm/
plop them in /sys/modules/syscons/
type make in the worm dir
cp worm_saver.ko /modules
kldload worm_saver
shift-pause to activate
review code, commit :)
